claims.text: 1. A method of treating sialorrhea in a human patient, which comprises orally administering about 1 mg to about 10 mg of glycopyrrolate in a liquid solution to the human patient under fasted condition...

use_codes.desc: REDUCE CHRONIC SEVERE DROOLING (I.E., SIALORRHEA)  IN PATIENTS WITH NEUROLOGIC CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH PROBLEM DROOLING

indications.text:
CUVPOSA is indicated to reduce chronic severe drooling in patients aged 3 to 16 years with neurologic conditions associated with problem drooling
(e.g., cerebral palsy).

palsy).
